rationale: Both correctly diagnose the same root cause (missing extended ratio tokens in the base tokenizer, hunyuan_image3.py:1561-1563) and give the identical confirmed workaround, matching the thread closely. X's disposition ('resolved/closed, follow-up tracked in a dedicated issue') matches Gaohan123's actual instruction to open a new issue for the improvement, whereas Y's 'keep-open, reopen condition: guard PR merged' misreads that instruction and conflicts with how the thread actually resolved. Y adds extra specifics (token IDs 130103-130106, a third 'hunyuan_image3_ar.yaml' config) that are unverifiable against the ground truth and read as speculative padding rather than confirmed grounding, while X's narrative is tighter and flows better as an actual maintainer reply.
